[TestProject – Style Guide v1.0]

=============================
CORE PRINCIPLES
=============================
- Stories should balance mystery with warmth.
- Fear arrives slowly, never announced.
- Every scene serves character or tension.

=============================
DIALOGUE RULES
=============================
- Characters speak with distinct voices.
- Silence carries weight.
- Subtext drives every conversation.

=============================
WEATHER CLAUSE
=============================
- Weather reflects mood but never telegraphs danger.
- Fog is a character, not a backdrop.
- Rain should feel personal.

=============================
VERSION CHANGELOG
=============================
**v1.0** – Initial style guide for test project.
